since_last: 53% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.07%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.08% · BTC +0.38% · Nasdaq100 +0.31%. 53% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.07%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.07%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.65%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: VRT is the standout at +7.60%
cards.body: Leaders: VRT +7.60%, SMR +7.58%, ARM +7.38%, AMAT +7.26%, OKLO +6.46%. Laggards: APP -4.53%, SNAP -4.07%, AI -3.93%, META -3.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.86% at $196.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.86% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
